    1200 12 0 0 0 0
    RX errors:  length crc frame fifo missed
    0 0 0 0 0
    TX:  bytes packets errors dropped carrier collsns
    1200 12 0 0 0 0
    TX errors: aborted fifo window heartbeat transns
    0 0 0 0 0
